name: ovos-skill-alerts
documentation: # Alerts ## Summary A skill to manage alarms, timers, reminders, events and todos and optionally sync them with a CalDAV service. ## Description The skill provides functionality to create alarms, timers, reminders and todo (lists), remove them by name, time, or type, and ask for what is active. If you choose to syncronize with a DAV server, you can also access your reminders and todo lists from other devices. Alarms and reminders may be set to recur daily or weekly. An active alert may be snoozed for a specified amount of time while it is active. Any alerts that are not acknowledged will be added to a list of missed alerts that may be read and cleared when requested. If you were away, your device was off, or the device was napping, ask for a summary of what was missed. The number of notifications missed can be seen on the upper left corner of the Home screen. ### Distinction between reminder, event and todo __*Events*__ Appointments, gigs, ... that may (but not necessarily) have a start and end time. Like this you are notified if an e.g. appointment collides with another one. Events may be created with a prenotification in advance __*Reminders*__ Less formal dates that only have a start time. (Although you can set a repeating reminder also with an endpoint - eg "remind me to take out the trash every day at 7pm until next saturday") __*Todos*__ Non time related "short term memory" for things to do. Todos can be organised in lists. Eg shopping list __*Alert*__ is a bucket term for all of the different types. ----------------------- ## Scenarios Keywords are underlined, _alert names_ italic if not specifically mentioned (like _bread_ timer, _tennis_ event), the name defaults to the time it is set for (eg _8 AM_ alarm, _2 minute_ timer) ### Alarms, Timers, Reminders, Events *One time* alarms, timers, reminders or events: - "Set an alarm for _8 AM_." - "Set a _bread_ timer for 30 minutes." - "Schedule a _tennis_ event for 2 PM on friday spanning 2 hours." ... _(events may be created with a prenotification in advance)_ HINT: _A *timer* started without a time specified acts like a stop timer counting up from now. To stop it and voice the time delta say "Timer stop"._ *Recurring* alarms, reminders or events: - "Set a daily alarm for _8 AM_." - "Set an alarm for 8 AM on saturdays." - "remind me to _take out the trash_ every Thursday and Sunday at 7 PM." *OCP* Alarm: (Alarm triggering Media Player; _depends on the OCP capabilities of your device/serveing instance_) - "wake me up at 8 AM with music." (in general: "... with {media type}) -> the skill will ask you which media title to play -> lookup media in the media library - "wake me with music." (_change/set media on an already created alarm_; next alarm will be chosen) *Reschedule* an existing alarm, timer, reminder or event: (duration or fixed time) - "Reschedule my _8 AM_ alarm at 9 AM." - "Push the _tennis_ event by one hour." - "Move my next event one hour earlier." - "Extend the _bread_ timer by 2 minutes." (or: Extend the _bread_ timer until 10 am) - "Change the _8 AM_ alarm recurring only mondays and tuesdays." - "Change _tennis_ event length to 3 hours." HINT: _You can reschedule the time of a recurring alarm and will be asked if that applies to all or just the next one._ *Query*: - "When is my next alarm?" - "Which reminders are scheduled today?" - "Are there any events between friday and sunday?" (also: "between friday 10am and 3 pm") _running timer_ - "How much time is left on my _bread_ timer?" *Cancel*: - _specific type/name:_ "Cancel my _8 AM_ alarm." (in general: "cancel my {name} {type}") - _all / of a type_: "Cancel all alerts." / "Cancel all alarms." - _on a specific day_: "Cancel alerts on saturday." - _in a time period_: "Cancel alerts between Friday 8 AM and 10 AM." - _next_: "Cancel my next alarm." CAUTION: _Double check if you "cancel all", especially when using DAV, as it will drop all of the reminder/events._ *Active alert* (expired and currently speaking or playing): - _dismiss_: "Stop alert." - _snooze_: "Snooze." (factory default is 15 minutes) - _duration_: "Snooze for 1 minute." / "Snooze until 8 AM." HINT: _You can also "snooze" an active reminder/timer with "remind me again at 10 AM." / "extend by 2 minutes". The alert name must not be mentioned in this instance. Active alerts are always considerred directly editable._ *Missed alerts* (expired and not acknowledged): - "Which alert did i miss?" - "Missed any alerts?" ### Todo - [x] walk the dog - [ ] shopping - [ ] milk - [ ] toast _(When using nextcloud as DAV server, be sure to use the "Tasks" plugin application)_ _*Create:*_ - "Remind me to _walk the dog_" - "create a _shopping_ list" (with the option to populate the list afterwards) _*Sublist:*_ - "add items to the _shopping_ list" -> _set the items one by one: eg. milk *pling* toast *pling* .._ _(silence stops recording)_ _(list is shown on screen/voiced in advance)_ _*Complete todos:*_ - "scratch milk entry from the _shopping_ list" - _Optionally remove one/multiple; list is shown on screen/voiced :_ "remove item(s) from the _shopping_ list" - Remove all items on the _shopping_ list - Remove _shopping_ list _analogous for non lists:_ - "remove _walk the dog_ note" - "remove todo entr(y/ies)" - "remove all memos" (if DAV active, marked as complete on server) _Query:_ * _list names :_ "which lists are stored?" _... "shopping"_ * _list items :_ "which items are on the _shopping_ list?" _... "milk and toast"_ * _todo items :_ "Anything todo?" _... "i should remind you to walk the dog"_ ### DAV _Calendar names:_ - which calendars are available? _Sync:_ (Supposed to run automatically every x minutes, but can be triggered manually) - synchronize calendars --------- ## Settings _(this is the default)_ ```python { "speak_alarm": false, # if the alarm should be spoken "speak_timer": true, # if the timer should be spoken "sound_alarm": "", # default constant_beep.mp3 "sound_timer": "", # default beep4.mp3 "snooze_mins": 15, # default snooze time if duration/time is not specified "timeout_min": 1, # the duration the user is notified, after which the alert is considered missed # (doesn't apply to media -radio/video/..- alarms) "play_volume": 90, # volume of the alert sound "escalate_volume": true, # alarms only - raise volume over time (10% steps, dependent on timeout_min; # half the time on max volume = `play_volume`) "priority_cutoff": 8 ... } ``` DAV settings see below ## Setting up DAV connection (tested with NextCloud) By now, you have to edit the credential file manually, this will change in the future With the startup of the skill, a template file will be created under `~/.local/share/mycroft/filesystem/skills//dav_credentials.json` ```python { "": { "url": "https:///remote.php/dav", "username": "...", "password": "...", "ssl_verify_cert": "..." # if SSL is set up, otherwise delete this line }, "": ... } ``` First setup the credentials, then populate respective parts in the skill settings file `settings.json` the skill setting get reloaded and the repeating sync event starts (every `frequency` seconds) ```python { ..., "services": ",", # comma separated string of services "frequency": 15, # the number of minutes between syncronisation; default 15 "sync_ask": false # If it should be asked if a generated reminder/todo element should be synchronized } ``` The skill fetches DAV calendar dates one year in advance. You can set up multiple calendars on the server, the skill will ask to which it should be synced. Errors during connection will be voiced, for specifics check the skill log. Only events, reminder and todos will be synced. Alarms and timers won't be. Check the timezone on your server/event, as sometimes the timezone is not recognized properly and therefor scheduled incorrectly ## Known Bugs / Troubleshooting _Generally, this skill is meant for ovos-core >= 0.0.8 and its dependencies. If you are using an older version, please update or you might experience major problems. The skill is tested predominantly in german and (to a lesser extent) english, but might lack certain individual speech patterns. Other languages are autotranslated and need to be sanitized. In the alpha phase we like to encourage you to contribute to form a well balanced experience for a wide variety of languages_ - __The skill wont understand/misinterpret what i'm saying.__ _Check the logs for the intent that was triggered and the utterance that was transcribed. STT might have gotten the words wrong. Maybe change the service (Known issue especially with non english speakers using Whisper)_ - __The notification system is not working properly. Missed alerts are not shown.__ _The notifications sometimes get mixed up, this is a known issue and it's worked on. Be sure you are using the latest `ovos-gui-plugin-shell-companion` ([#](https://github.com/OpenVoiceOS/ovos-gui-plugin-shell-companion)) and have the old `ovos-PHAL-plugin-notification-widgets` deinstalled._ - __When polpulating a list, the last element is followed by an "unknown" utterance.__ _This is a known issue and will be fixed in the next release. It's a problem with the way the skill is handling the input in a response context. It's not critical and can be ignored for now. The list is populated correctly most of the time_ ## Recommended Versions These aren't hard requirements as preferences may vary, but recommended GUI: `skill-ovos-homescreen >= 0.0.3a6` (There is also a [PR](https://github.com/OpenVoiceOS/skill-ovos-homescreen/pull/92) pending) ## Incompatible Skills This skill has known intent collisions and replaces: - [skill-reminder.mycroftAI](https://github.com/mycroftai/skill-reminder) - [skill-alarm.mycroftAI](https://github.com/mycroftai/skill-alarm) - [mycroft-timer.mycroftAI](https://github.com/mycroftai/mycroft-timer) - [skill-alerts.NeonGeckoCom](https://github.com//skill-alerts) Be sure to remove them before installing this skill. ## Contributing Translations The skill is for the most part autotranslated (except en/de) and needs to be sanitized. As the examples above show, the skill is using adapt keywords to determine intent. The [vocabulary]() keywords should include a variety of synonym nouns and verbs to satisfy a wide range of speech patterns. Dates and names are parsed either as a leftover (ie. non keyword) or following a keyword (eg. `until.voc` _until 6 AM_) Noise words that should be ignored parsing a reminder name are listed in `noise_words.voc` (eg. "remind me to take out the trash -> `take out trash`) _Dialogs_ are straight forward most of the time and should include the correct mustache tags from the get go. These are easy patterns to keep in mind. If you want to contribute to the translation, please check the `vocab` folder and add the respective files for your language. A basic understanding of the intent structure and what to make of it is required. ```python require("query").one_of("alarm", "reminder", "event", "alert", "remind").optionally("and").optionally("stored") # <- vocab ``` In the likely case that questions arise, feel free to contact @sgee_ in matrix chat. ## Contact Support Use [this link (Matrix Chat)](https://matrix.to/#/!XFpdtmgyCoPDxOMPpH:matrix.org?via=matrix.org) or [submit an issue on GitHub](https://github.com/OpenVoiceOS/skill-alerts/issues) ## Credits [NeonGeckoCom](https://github.com/NeonGeckoCom) [NeonDaniel](https://github.com/NeonDaniel) ## Category **Productivity** Daily ## Tags #OVOS #OpenVoiceOS #alert #alarm #timer #reminder #schedule

Checks if there are results found in the search and returns the

functions.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.dav_utils.get_dav_items
documentation:
Get the events and todos from a specific DAV calendar
\:param calendar: caldav calendar object
\:param timespan: the timespan when searching for events (optional)
\:returns: list of Alert objects

documentation:
get a dict representation of an caldav icalendar todo event
\:param properties: tuple of icalendar properties
\:returns: dict

documentation:
get a dict representation of an caldav icalendar event
\:param properties: tuple of icalendar properties
\:returns: dict

functions.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.dav_utils._build_dt_from_date
documentation:
Convert datetime.date ("whole day reminder") into datetime.datetime
Try to get the timezone from the description or use the mycroft 
level default

functions.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.dav_utils._add_relations
documentation:
Helper to deploy additional contextual information about their
relationship (parent/child)
\:param events: list of caldav icalendar instance properties
\:returns: list of Alert objects

functions.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert.alert_time_in_range
documentation:
Checks if two alerts with given start and end datetimes
overlap each other.
\:param start: datetime
\:param end: datetime, mostly end dt of timespan check
\:param ref_start: event reference start datetime
\:param ref_end: event reference end datetime
\:returns: bool

functions.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert.is_alert_type
documentation:
Check if an alert is of a given type
\:param alert: Alert object
\:param alert_type: AlertType
\:returns: bool

functions.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert.properties_changed
documentation:
Helper to check if the properties of a local reminder differs from that of a DAV event
(i.e. changes were made upstream)
Note: Local changes gets synced right away

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert.Alert.data
documentation: Return a json-dumpable dict representation of this alert

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert.Alert.serialize
documentation: Return a string representation of the alert

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert.Alert.user
documentation: Return the user associated with this alert

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert.Alert.lang
documentation: Returns the lang associated with this alert

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert.Alert.created
documentation: Return the datetime the alert was created

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert.Alert.stopwatch
documentation: Returns the time elapsed since the alert was created

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert.Alert.stopwatch_mode
documentation: Returns the stopwatch mode

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert.Alert.stopwatch_mode
documentation: Sets the stopwatch mode

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert.Alert.timezone
documentation: Tzinfo associated with this alert's expiration

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert.Alert.alert_type
documentation: :returns: the associated Alert type Enum

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert.Alert.dav_type
documentation: :returns: the associated DAV type Enum (VTODO,VEVENT)

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert.Alert.ident
documentation: :returns: the uuid identifier of the alert

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert.Alert.related_to
documentation: :returns: the parent uuid the alert is associated with

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert.Alert.children
documentation: :returns: list of child uuid the alert is associated with

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert.Alert.priority
documentation: :returns: the alert priority (1-10)

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert.Alert.priority
documentation: store the alert priority (1-10)

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert.Alert.context
documentation: Returns the contextual info of the alert

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert.Alert.alert_name
documentation: Returns the name of the alert

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert.Alert.prenotification
documentation: Returns the datetime to be noticed prior to the actual event
Expiration

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert.Alert.expiration
documentation:
Return the next valid expiration time for this alert. Returns None if
the alert is expired and has no valid repeat options. If there is a
valid repeat, the alert will no longer report as expired.

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert.Alert.has_expiration
documentation:
Returns whether the alert has an experiation date of any kind
(expiration/prenotification).

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert.Alert.is_expired
documentation:
Return True if this alert expired, this does not account for any
repeat behavior and reports using the last determined expiration time

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert.Alert.is_all_day
documentation: Returns whether the alert is a whole day alert

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert.Alert.is_all_day
documentation: Sets the all_day property

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert.Alert.time_to_expiration
documentation:
Return the time until `next_expiration_time` (negative) if alert expired.
This does not account for any repeat behavior, call `expiration`
to check for a repeating event.

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert.Alert.repeat_days
documentation: :returns: A set of Weekdays the alert is set up with
Repeat Information

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert.Alert.repeat_frequency
documentation: :returns: A timedelta object of the repeat frequency

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert.Alert.has_repeat
documentation: :returns: Whether the alert has any repeat information.

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert.Alert.reset_repeat
documentation:
Resets the expiration time to the last expiration (or to the 
time of creation if no repeat information is present).
Mostly used to reschedule recurring alerts to set a new
start point to calculate from

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert.Alert.remove_repeat
documentation: Purges repeat information

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert.Alert.until
documentation: :returns: The datetime the event (or the repeat mechanism thereof) ends.

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert.Alert.audio_file
documentation: Returns the audio filename launched on expiration
Media associated

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert.Alert.ocp_request
documentation:
OVOS Common Play search string that is set when requesting a music
alarm

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert.Alert.media_type
documentation:
Returns the media assosiated with the alert
:returns: string of the voc name

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert.Alert.media_source
documentation:
Returns the media assosiated with the alert
:returns: string of the voc name

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert.Alert.service
documentation: DAV Service the alert is associated with
DAV properties

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert.Alert.calendar
documentation: DAV Calendar the alert is associated with

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert.Alert.synchronized
documentation: State of DAV synchronicity

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert.Alert.skip_sync
documentation: Whether the alert should be skipped during DAV synchronization

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert.Alert.add_context
documentation:
Add the requested context to the alert, conflicting values will be
overwritten with the new context.
\:param ctx: new context to add to alert

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert.Alert.add_child
documentation:
Adds a child alert uuid to the context.
\:param ident: the id (uuid) of the child

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert.Alert.remove_child
documentation:
Removes a child alert uuid from the context
\:param ident: the id (uuid) of the child

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert.Alert.set_parent
documentation:
Sets a parent alert uuid
\:param ident: the id (uuid) of the parent

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert.Alert.remove_parent
documentation:
Removes the parent alert uuid
\:param ident: the id (uuid) of the parent

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert.Alert.advance
documentation:
Advances the expiration the next following date.
One time alerts expiration will be set to `None`

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert.Alert._get_next_expiration_time
documentation: Determine the next time this alert will expire and update Alert data

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert.Alert.from_dict
documentation:
Parse a dumped alert dict into an Alert object
\:param alert_data: dict as returned by `Alert.data`
Constructors

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert.Alert.from_ical
documentation:
Parse the properties of an caldav icalendar instance into an Alert object
\:param alert_data: dict as returned by `Alert.data`

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert.Alert.to_ical
documentation:
Creates an icalendar Calendar object of the alert that can by synced
to DAV.
:returns: icalendar.Calendar

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert.Alert.deserialize
documentation:
Parse a serialized alert into an Alert object
\:param alert_str: str returned by `Alert.serialize`

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert.Alert.create
documentation:
Object representing an arbitrary alert
\:param expiration: datetime representing first alert expiration
\:param prenotification: negative delta to expiration in seconds
\:param alert_name: human-readable name for this alert
\:param alert_type: type of alert (i.e. alarm, timer, reminder)
\:param priority: int priority 1-10
\:param repeat_frequency: time in seconds between alert occurrences
\:param repeat_days: set of weekdays for an alert to repeat
\:param until: datetime of final repeat/end of event
\:param audio_file: audio_file to playback on alert expiration
\:param context: Message context associated with alert

Get a translated string for the specified alert_type

\:returns: translated string representation of alert_type

functions.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.locale.get_words_list
documentation:
Returns a list of localized words from a skill resource
\:param lang: the language of the resource
\:returns list of noise words

functions.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.locale.find_resource
documentation:
Helper function to locate the skill ressource on the file system
\:param res_name: filename of the resource
\:returns Path object of the file location or None

functions.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.locale.spoken_duration
documentation:
Gets a speakable string representing time until alert_time
\:param alert_time: Datetime or timedelta to get duration until
\:param anchor_time: Datetime to count duration from
\:param lang: Language to format response in
\:return: speakable duration string

functions.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.locale.get_alert_type_from_intent
documentation:
Parse the requested alert type based on intent vocab
\:param message: Message associated with intent match
\:returns: tuple of AlertType requested and spoken_type

functions.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.locale.get_alert_type
documentation:
Get the alert type enum from the intent passed
\:param message: Message associated with request
\:returns: alert type enum

functions.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.locale.spoken_weekday
documentation:
Get a translated string for the specified weekday
\:param weekday: Weekday to be spoken
\:returns: translated string representation of weekday

functions.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.locale.get_alert_dialog_data
documentation:
Parse a dict of data to be passed to the dialog renderer for the alert.
\:param alert: Alert to build dialog for
\:param lang: User language to be spoken
\:returns: dict dialog_data to pass to `speak_dialog`

functions.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.locale.voc_match
documentation:
Compares a string against a given words list
If exact the utterance must be identical, otherwise a part of the sentence

functions.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.parse_utils.tokenize_utterance
documentation:
Get utterance tokens, split on matched vocab
\:param message: Message associated with intent match
\:returns: list of utterance tokens where a tag defines a token

functions.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.parse_utils.round_nearest_minute
documentation:
Round an alert time to the nearest minute if it is longer than the cutoff
\:param alert_time: requested alert datetime
\:param cutoff: minimum delta to consider rounding the alert time
\:returns: datetime rounded to the nearest minute if delta exceeds cutoff

functions.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.parse_utils.get_default_alert_name
documentation:
Build a default name for the specified alert
\:param alert_time: datetime of next alert expiration
\:param alert_type: AlertType of alert to name
\:param now_time: datetime to anchor timers for duration
\:param lang: Language to format response in
\:return: name for alert

functions.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.parse_utils.has_default_name
documentation:
Check if the alert name is a default name (ie not specifically named)
\:param alert_name: name of alert to check
\:param lang: language to format response in
\:return: True if alert_name is the default name for the alert

functions.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.parse_utils.build_alert_from_intent
documentation:
Parse alert parameters from a matched intent into an Alert object
\:param message: Message associated with request
\:param timezone: Timezone for user associated with request
\:returns: Alert extracted from utterance or None if missing required params

functions.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.parse_utils.parse_repeat_from_message
documentation:
Parses a repeat clause from the utterance. If tokens are provided, handled
tokens are removed.
\:param message: Message associated with intent match
\:param tokens: optional tokens parsed from message by `tokenize_utterances`
\:returns: list of parsed repeat Weekdays or timedelta between occurrences

functions.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.parse_utils.parse_end_condition_from_message
documentation:
Parses an end condition from the utterance. If tokens are provided, handled
tokens are removed.
\:param message: Message associated with intent match
\:param tokens: optional tokens parsed from message by `tokenize_utterances`
\:param timezone: timezone of request, defaults to mycroft location
\:returns: extracted datetime of end condition, else None

functions.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.parse_utils.parse_alert_time_from_message
documentation:
Parse a requested alert time from the request utterance
\:param message: Message associated with intent match
\:param tokens: optional tokens parsed from message by `tokenize_utterances`
\:param timezone: timezone of request, defaults to mycroft location
\:param anchor_time: The base datetime the utterance is relative to
\:returns: Parsed datetime for the alert or None if no time is extracted

functions.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.parse_utils.parse_timedelta_from_message
documentation:
Parse the timedelta relative to the anchortime from the request utterance
\:param message: Message associated with intent match
\:param tokens: optional tokens parsed from message by `tokenize_utterances`
\:param timezone: timezone of request, defaults to mycroft location
\:param anchor_time: The base datetime the utterance is relative to
\:returns: Parsed datetime for the alert or None if no time is extracted

functions.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.parse_utils.parse_audio_file_from_message
documentation:
Parses a requested audiofile from the utterance. If tokens are provided,
handled tokens are removed.
\:param message: Message associated with intent match
\:param tokens: optional tokens parsed from message by `tokenize_utterances`
\:returns: extracted audio file path, else None
TODO: Toss - should be handled via OCP

functions.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.parse_utils.parse_alert_priority_from_message
documentation:
Extract the requested alert priority from intent message.
If tokens are provided, handled tokens are removed.
\:param message: Message associated with request
\:param tokens: optional tokens parsed from message by `tokenize_utterances`

functions.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.parse_utils.parse_alert_name_from_message
documentation:
Try to parse an alert name from unparsed tokens
\:param message: Message associated with the request
\:param tokens: optional tokens parsed from message by `tokenize_utterances`
\:returns: Best guess at a name extracted from tokens

functions.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.parse_utils.parse_alert_name_and_time_from_message
documentation:
Parse an alert name and time from a request
\:param message: Message associated with request
\:param tokens: optional tokens parsed from message by `tokenize_utterances`
\:param timezone: timezone of request, defaults to mycroft location
\:returns tuple containing alert name and alert time

functions.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.parse_utils.parse_alert_context_from_message
documentation:
Parse the request message context and ensure required parameters exist
\:param message: Message associated with the request
\:returns: dict context to include in Alert object

functions.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.parse_utils.extract_dt_or_duration
documentation:
Helper to extract either a duration or datetime
If a duration is extracted and no anchor date is passed the timedelta will be
returned else added/substracted to/from the anchor date
\:param text: the string to be parsed
\:param anchorDate: a datetime to which a timedelta is added to
\:param add: whether a duration should be added or substracted
TODO: no need for timezone in the signature

functions.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.parse_utils.validate_dt_or_delta
documentation: Validates if the sentence contains a datetime or duration

functions.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.parse_utils.validate_dt
documentation: Validates if the sentence contains a datetime

functions.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.parse_utils.get_week_range
documentation:
Get the start and end dates of the week containing the given reference date.

Args:
    ref_date (datetime): The reference date to use for calculating the week
                         range.

Returns:
    Tuple[datetime, datetime]: A tuple of datetime objects representing the
                               start and end dates of the week containing the
                               given reference date.

functions.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.parse_utils.fuzzy_match
documentation:
Rapidfuzz matcher
Compares with different mechanisms (ratio/partial ratio/token sort ratio)
to account for potential STT misbehaviour
If no confindence cut \[0-100\] is passed, it returns the aggegated confidence
else it compares the aggegated confidence to the confidence cut
\:param test: the test string
\:param against: the string to test against
\:param conf: confidence cut (optional)

functions.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.parse_utils.fuzzy_match_alerts
documentation:
Fuzzy matches a list of Alerts and returns the best match (alert names are
tested)
If a confidence cut \[0-100\] is passed only those matched above are considerred
\:param test: the alert list to test
\:param against: the string to test against
\:param conf: confidence cut (optional)

documentation: START_VERSION_BLOCK

functions.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert_manager.sort_alerts_list
documentation:
Sort the passed list of alerts by time of next expiration,
chronologically ascending. Allows None sorting (to the end).
\:param alerts: list of Alert objects to sort
\:returns: sorted list of alerts

functions.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert_manager.get_alerts_by_type
documentation:
Parse a list of alerts into a dict of alerts by alert type.
\:param alerts: list of Alert objects to organize
\:returns: dict of AlertType to list of alerts

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert_manager.AlertManager.missed_alerts
documentation: Returns a static dict of current missed alerts

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert_manager.AlertManager.pending_alerts
documentation: Returns a static dict of current pending alerts

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert_manager.AlertManager.active_alerts
documentation: Returns a static dict of current active alerts

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert_manager.AlertManager.active_ids
documentation: Returns a set of active alert uuids

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert_manager.AlertManager.pending_ids
documentation: Returns a set of pending alert uuids

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert_manager.AlertManager.missed_ids
documentation: Returns a set of missed alert uuids

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert_manager.AlertManager.synchron_ids
documentation: Returns a set of dav synchron uuids

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert_manager.AlertManager.dav_active
documentation: Returns whether DAV was fully initialised

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert_manager.AlertManager.dav_services
documentation: Returns a list of active DAV services

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert_manager.AlertManager.dav_calendars
documentation: Returns a list of dav calendar names available on DAV

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert_manager.AlertManager.init_dav_clients
documentation:
Creates dav clients from the credential dict specified
\:param services: list of services to initialize
\:param frequency: minutes between sync events
\:param test_connectivity: whether to test the connectivity (optional)
\:returns: errors (dict conataining dialog/services pairs) to be voiced

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert_manager.AlertManager.get_alert_status
documentation:
Get the current state of the requested alert_id. If a repeating alert
exists in multiple states, it will report in priority order:
ACTIVE, MISSED, PENDING
\:param alert_id: ID of alert to query
\:returns: AlertState of the requested alert or None if alert not found
Query Methods

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert_manager.AlertManager.get_alert
documentation:
Get a Alert opbject by ident.
\:param alert_id: ID of alert to query
\:returns: Alert opbject/object data

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert_manager.AlertManager.get_alerts
documentation:
Get a sorted list of all managed alerts.
:returns: dict of disposition to sorted alerts for all users

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert_manager.AlertManager.get_pending_alerts
documentation:
Return a list of pending alerts
Optionally restrict this list by user and/or type

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert_manager.AlertManager.get_active_alerts
documentation:
Return a list of active alerts
Optionally restrict this list by user and/or type

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert_manager.AlertManager.get_missed_alerts
documentation:
Return a list of missed alerts
Optionally restrict this list by user and/or type

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert_manager.AlertManager.get_alerts_in_timeframe
documentation:
Get a list of alert (reminder) objects which are overlapping
with the datetime(s) passed
\:param t1: expiration datetime of the event
\:param t1: expiration datetime of the event
\:param alert_type: expiration datetime of the event
\:returns List of alert objects

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert_manager.AlertManager.get_connected_alerts
documentation:
Return a list of connected alerts (ie the alert has a child alert)
Optionally restrict this list by user and/or type

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert_manager.AlertManager.get_unconnected_alerts
documentation:
Return a list of unconnected alerts (ie the alert has no child and 
parent alert)
Optionally restrict this list by user and/or type

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert_manager.AlertManager.get_children
documentation:
Get a list of alert objects which are children of the specified ident
\:param ident: identification uuid
\:returns List of alert objects

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert_manager.AlertManager.get_parents
documentation:
Get a list of alert objects which are parents of the specified ident
\:param ident: identification uuid
\:returns List of alert objects

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert_manager.AlertManager.mark_alert_missed
documentation:
Mark an active alert as missed
\:param alert_id: ident of active alert to mark as missed
Alert Management

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert_manager.AlertManager.mark_alert_synchron
documentation:
Mark an alert as synchron (with DAV)
\:param alert: alert to be marked as snychron

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert_manager.AlertManager.remove_synchron_state
documentation:
Remove the synchron flag from an alert.
\:param alert: alert to be marked as not snychron

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert_manager.AlertManager.snooze_alert
documentation:
Snooze an active or missed alert for some period of time.
\:param alert_id: ID of active or missed alert to snooze
\:param snooze_duration: time until next notification
\:returns: New Alert added to pending

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert_manager.AlertManager.reschedule_alert
documentation:
Manages a rescheduled alert
If no new expiration is passed, the alert is rescheduled on the expiration set in the alert.
In case of a repeating alert `once` can be set to reschedule only the next alert.

```
param old_alert

alert to be rescheduled

param new_expiration

(optional) new expiration time

param once

(default: False) whether the alert should be rescheduled once
```

\:param

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert_manager.AlertManager.add_alert
documentation:
Add an alert to the scheduler and return the alert ID
:returns: string identifier for the scheduled alert

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert_manager.AlertManager.rm_alert
documentation:
Remove an alert with given disposition (pending/active/missed).
If no disposition is passed it is searched in the database.
Drops dav content (default=False) if DAV connection is active

```
param alert_id

ident of active alert to remove

param disposition

(pending/active/missed) alert, default pending

param drop_dav

whether to drop the item on DAV
```

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert_manager.AlertManager.add_timer_to_gui
documentation:
Add a timer to the GUI.
\:param alert: Timer to add to GUI

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert_manager.AlertManager.dismiss_alert_from_gui
documentation: Dismiss an alert from long-lived GUI displays.

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert_manager.AlertManager._schedule_alert
documentation:
Schedule an event for the next expiration of the specified Alert
\:param alrt: Alert object to schedule
\:param ident: Unique identifier associated with the Alert
Alert Event Handlers

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert_manager.AlertManager._cancel_scheduled_event
documentation:
Remove the scheduler event(s) of a specific alert
\:param alert: Alert object to remove

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert_manager.AlertManager._handle_alert_expiration
documentation:
Called upon expiration of an alert. Updates internal references, checks
for repeat cases, and calls the specified callback.
\:param message: Message associated with expired alert

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert_manager.AlertManager._dump_cache
documentation: Write current alerts to the cache on disk. Active alerts are not cached
File Operations

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert_manager.AlertManager._load_cache
documentation: Read alerts from cache on disk. Any loaded alerts will be overwritten.

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert_manager.AlertManager.write_cache_now
documentation: Write the current state of the AlertManager to file cache

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert_manager.AlertManager.get_dav_calendar
documentation:
Get Calendar object of the specified DAV service with the specified calendar name
All operational tasks are called upon this calendar object
\:param service: the service the calendar is associated with
\:param name: the calendar name
\:returns: Calendar object
DAV Operations

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert_manager.AlertManager.get_dav_calendars
documentation:
Get all Calendar object of the DAV services initialized
:returns: list of Calendar objects

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert_manager.AlertManager.get_calendar_names
documentation:
Returns all calendar names from across the specified DAV services
:returns dict of service/calendar names list pairs

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert_manager.AlertManager.sync_dav_item
documentation:
Manually sync an alert with DAV
Note: Only necessary if it got locally edited (rescheduled, ..),
as this is not handled by sync_dav
\:param alert: Alert object to be synced

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert_manager.AlertManager.drop_dav_item
documentation:
Drop a specific event that is hosted on a given DAV service
\:param alert: a Alert object to be dropped
\:param subitems: list of uids from Alert(todo) subitems to be dropped

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert_manager.AlertManager.mark_todo_complete
documentation:
deletes a specific Todo item and marks it as complete on the DAV service
\:param alert: a Reminder/Todo object to be dropped

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert_manager.AlertManager.sync_dav
documentation:
Keeps alert and the CalDAVs defined in the skills initialization up to-date.
The logic would ensure every future event (in a certain timeframe) on DAV gets
synced. It is possible to change dates on DAV that would also be fetched and
updated on the local storage without traces.

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.util.alert_manager.AlertManager.shutdown
documentation:
Shutdown the Alert Manager. Mark any active alerts as missed and update
the alerts cache on disk. Remove all events from the EventScheduler.
shutdown

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.AlertSkill.alert_manager
documentation: Get the AlertManager that tracks all Alert objects and their statuses.

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.AlertSkill.speak_alarm
documentation: If true, speak dialog for expired alarms instead of playing audio files.

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.AlertSkill.speak_timer
documentation: If true, speak dialog for expired alarms instead of playing audio files.

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.AlertSkill.alarm_sound_file
documentation: Return the path to a valid alarm sound resource file

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.AlertSkill.timer_sound_file
documentation: Return the path to a valid timer sound resource file

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.AlertSkill.play_volume
documentation: Return the volume to play audio files at

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.AlertSkill.snooze_duration
documentation: Get default snooze duration

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.AlertSkill.alert_timeout_seconds
documentation: Return the number of seconds to repeat an alert before marking it missed

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.AlertSkill.on_ready
documentation: On ready, update the Home screen elements

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.AlertSkill.handle_create_alarm
documentation:
Intent handler for creating an alarm
\:param message: Message associated with request
Intent Handlers
@killable_intent()

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.AlertSkill.handle_create_alarm_alt
documentation:
Alternate intent handler for creating an alarm
\:param message: Message associated with request

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.AlertSkill.handle_create_timer
documentation:
Intent handler for creating a timer
\:param message: Message associated with request
@killable_intent()

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.AlertSkill.handle_create_reminder
documentation:
Intent handler for creating a reminder
\:param message: Message associated with request
@killable_intent()

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.AlertSkill.handle_create_reminder_alt
documentation:
Alternate intent handler for creating a reminder
\:param message: Message associated with request
@killable_intent()

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.AlertSkill.handle_create_event
documentation:
Intent handler for creating an event. Wraps handle_create_reminder
\:param message: Message associated with request
@killable_intent()

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.AlertSkill.handle_reschedule_alert
documentation:
Intent to reschedule an alarm, reminder, event or timer
\:param message: Message associated with request

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.AlertSkill.handle_change_properties
documentation:
Intent to reschedule an alarm, reminder, event or timer
\:param message: Message associated with request

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.AlertSkill.handle_event_timeframe_check
documentation:
Intent to check if there are events stored at a given datetime /
within a given timeframe. If no datetime is passed list all of given type
Examples:

> Are there any events pending between monday 10:00 am and 12:00 am
> Are there any events stored on tuesday
> Are there any events at 8 pm

```
param message

Message associated with request
```
Query Alerts

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.AlertSkill.handle_list_all_alerts
documentation:
Handler to handle request for all alerts (kind optional)
\:param message: Message associated with request

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.AlertSkill.handle_next_alert
documentation:
Intent handler to handle request for the next alert (kind optional)
\:param message: Message associated with request

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.AlertSkill.handle_timer_status
documentation:
Intent handler to handle request for timer status (name optional)
\:param message: Message associated with request

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.AlertSkill.handle_missed_alerts
documentation:
Intent to handle any alerts that have been missed.

methods.name: ovos_skill_alerts.AlertSkill._dismiss_alert
documentation:
Handle a request to dismiss an alert. Removes the first valid entry in
active, missed, or pending lists.
Also handles GUI pages and homescreen widgets

```
param alert_id

ID of alert to dismiss

param drop_dav

if True, remove from DAV service

param speak

if True, speak confirmation of alert dismissal
```
